_comment: Shared cross-repo regression fixtures for runSmartMatch / smartMatcher.js. Both fixlo-frontend and fixlo-spectre must assert all cases pass. Algorithm: Person/TrueWallet uses sequential P1 (account wildcard, score 100) → P2 (exact/alias 100, partial 80) → PENDING_REVIEW (never UNMAPPED). Gateway: bank_code match → 100 → AUTO_MAPPED, else PENDING_REVIEW. AUTO_THRESHOLD=80. REVIEW_THRESHOLD retained in transactionState only.

cases.description: Gateway: bank_code 'wealth.wave' matches → score 100 → AUTO_MAPPED

scanned.name: wealth.wave

masterAccounts.account_name: Wealth.wave Gateway

cases.description: Gateway: bank_code 'apay' matches, name irrelevant → score 100 → AUTO_MAPPED

scanned.name: other agent

masterAccounts.account_name: Apay Gateway
